title: Diffviewer JSON v1 Contract
description: JSON IPC contract for the diffviewer CLI. The CLI reads a ReviewRequest from stdin and writes a ReviewResponse to stdout. TUI output must go to stderr or the controlling TTY so stdout remains JSON-only.

ReviewRequest.title: ReviewRequest
ReviewRequest.description: Request payload supplied to diffviewer stdin for interactive review.

version.description: Contract version. Must be 1 for diffviewer JSON v1.

title.description: Optional human-readable review title displayed by the TUI.

files.description: Files to review, in presentation order.

ReviewFile.title: ReviewFile
ReviewFile.description: A single file diff input. Diffviewer compares currentContent against newContent.

currentContent.description: Existing file content before the proposed change.

newContent.description: Proposed file content after the change.

ReviewResponse.title: ReviewResponse
ReviewResponse.description: Response payload emitted by diffviewer stdout after the user completes or cancels review.

version.description: Contract version. Must be 1 for diffviewer JSON v1.

status.description: confirmed means the final review summary was approved; cancelled means the review was aborted or not confirmed.

resolutions.description: Per-file user decisions. For confirmed responses, action maps as: accept -> backup-and-replace, deny -> skip, skip -> align/manual-review.

message.description: Optional human-readable completion, cancellation, or diagnostic message.

path.description: Repository-relative path matching a requested file.

action.description: User-selected action. Mapping: accept -> backup-and-replace, deny -> skip, skip -> align/manual-review.
